creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 214644
patch to update the port

- update 2.30_2 -> 2.32
Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/TimeDate
- add LICENSE_FILE
- request maintainership, as Dmitry Sivachenko <demon@@FreeBSD.org>
	is absent for 8+ years, see:
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/devel/p5-TimeDate/Makefile?view=log

- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- Tested with:
12.1-RELEASE-p5 amd64
poudriere 3.3.4
perl 5.30.2
pkg 1.14.4
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say PASS.
